Container.Name: signoz-agent
Container.Overview:
SigNoz Agent is a lightweight OpenTelemetry collector companion for signoz-aio. [center][b][color=#ff8c00]JSONbored Verified Companion Template[/color][/b][/center]
This Unraid template runs a separate collector that can receive local application telemetry, scrape optional Prometheus targets, collect optional host metrics, collect optional Docker metrics, and tail optional Docker container logs before forwarding telemetry to your main SigNoz endpoint.
[b]When to use this:[/b] Use signoz-agent on remote Unraid servers, separate Docker hosts, or any machine where you want collection separated from the main signoz-aio backend. If you only need same-box collection on the server running signoz-aio, the built-in local host agent inside signoz-aio is usually simpler.
[b]Initial Setup:[/b] 1. Enter your SigNoz OTLP endpoint. For signoz-aio on another host, use HOST_OR_IP:4317 with the default gRPC exporter. 2. Click Apply. 3. Point local apps at this agent on OTLP gRPC port 4317 or OTLP HTTP port 4318. 4. Optional: enable host metrics, Docker metrics, Docker logs, or Prometheus targets in Advanced View and explicitly set the matching mounts or target list.
[b]Security Note:[/b] Host root, Docker socket, and Docker log mounts are blank by default. Enable only the collection sources you need. Docker socket access can expose Docker control access to this collector container.
Container.Changes: ### 2026-04-28 - Generated from CHANGELOG.md during release preparation. Do not edit manually. - Add initial signoz-agent companion template
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: observability monitoring telemetry opentelemetry otel collector agent traces metrics logs prometheus docker hostmetrics signoz
Container.Requires: Requires a reachable SigNoz OTLP endpoint, usually your main signoz-aio instance or a remote SigNoz deployment. If signoz-agent is installed on the same Unraid host as signoz-aio, the default 4317 and 4318 host ports will conflict unless one template is adjusted. Host root, Docker socket, and Docker log mounts are blank by default; explicitly configure only the host access you need. Mounting /var/run/docker.sock can expose Docker control access to the collector container.

Config.Name: SigNoz OTLP Endpoint
Config.Description: Required. Destination SigNoz OTLP endpoint. For signoz-aio on another host with the default gRPC exporter, use HOST_OR_IP:4317. For HTTP/protobuf, use an http:// or https:// endpoint ending at the OTLP HTTP listener.

Config.Name: OTLP gRPC Port
Config.Description: Local OTLP gRPC receiver port for apps and collectors that send telemetry to this agent.

Config.Name: OTLP HTTP Port
Config.Description: Local OTLP HTTP receiver port for apps and collectors that send telemetry to this agent.

Config.Name: AppData - SigNoz Agent
Config.Description: Persistent root for generated collector configuration, status, and diagnostics.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Container timezone.

Config.Name: [Exporter] Protocol
Config.Description: Advanced. Export protocol used to forward telemetry to SigNoz. Use grpc for signoz-aio 4317 and http/protobuf for SigNoz Cloud or 4318-style endpoints.

Config.Name: [Exporter] Insecure TLS
Config.Description: Advanced. Set true for plain-text or self-hosted gRPC endpoints without TLS. Set false for trusted TLS endpoints.

Config.Name: [Exporter] Headers
Config.Description: Advanced. Optional comma-separated exporter headers in key=value form. Values are masked because headers may contain credentials.

Config.Name: [Exporter] SigNoz Ingestion Key
Config.Description: Advanced. Optional SigNoz ingestion key. This is added as the signoz-ingestion-key header and is masked.

Config.Name: [Collector] Log Level
Config.Description: Advanced. OpenTelemetry collector log level.

Config.Name: [Collector] Resource Attributes
Config.Description: Advanced. Comma-separated resource attributes added to telemetry, for example host.name=unraid-remote,service.namespace=homelab.

Config.Name: [Collector] Deployment Environment
Config.Description: Advanced. Optional deployment.environment resource attribute such as homelab, production, or staging.

Config.Name: [Collector] Batch Send Size
Config.Description: Advanced. Collector batch send size.

Config.Name: [Collector] Batch Timeout
Config.Description: Advanced. Collector batch timeout.

Config.Name: [Collector] Memory Limit MiB
Config.Description: Advanced. OpenTelemetry memory limiter cap in MiB.

Config.Name: [Receiver] gRPC Listen Endpoint
Config.Description: Advanced. Internal OTLP gRPC receiver listen endpoint.

Config.Name: [Receiver] HTTP Listen Endpoint
Config.Description: Advanced. Internal OTLP HTTP receiver listen endpoint.

Config.Name: [Receiver] Health Endpoint
Config.Description: Advanced. Collector health extension endpoint. This port is not published by default.

Config.Name: [Host Metrics] Enable
Config.Description: Advanced. Enables hostmetrics collection. Requires explicitly setting the Host Root Path mount below.

Config.Name: [Host Metrics] Host Root Path
Config.Description: Advanced optional host metrics mount. Leave blank unless host metrics are enabled. Set to / to mount the Unraid host root read-only.

Config.Name: [Host Metrics] Collection Interval
Config.Description: Advanced. Host metrics collection interval.

Config.Name: [Docker Metrics] Enable
Config.Description: Advanced. Enables Docker container metrics. Requires explicitly setting the Docker Socket mount below.

Config.Name: [Docker Metrics] Docker Socket
Config.Description: Advanced optional Docker metrics mount. Leave blank unless Docker metrics are enabled. Mounting /var/run/docker.sock can expose Docker control access to this collector container.

Config.Name: [Docker Metrics] Collection Interval
Config.Description: Advanced. Docker metrics collection interval.

Config.Name: [Docker Metrics] Excluded Images
Config.Description: Advanced. Optional comma-separated image names to exclude from docker_stats collection, for example pause,otel/opentelemetry-collector-contrib. Container-name-specific exclusions require custom config mode.

Config.Name: [Docker Logs] Enable
Config.Description: Advanced. Enables Docker JSON log tailing. Requires explicitly setting the Docker Container Logs Path mount below.

Config.Name: [Docker Logs] Docker Container Logs Path
Config.Description: Advanced optional Docker log mount. Leave blank unless Docker logs are enabled. Set to /var/lib/docker/containers to read local Docker JSON logs.

Config.Name: [Prometheus] Targets
Config.Description: Advanced. Optional comma-separated Prometheus scrape targets, for example node-exporter:9100,cadvisor:8080.

Config.Name: [Prometheus] Metrics Path
Config.Description: Advanced. Prometheus metrics path used for all configured simple scrape targets.

Config.Name: [Prometheus] Scrape Interval
Config.Description: Advanced. Prometheus scrape interval.

Config.Name: [Custom Config] Mode
Config.Description: Advanced. Use generated for the Unraid-managed config. Use custom only when mounting and managing your own collector config.

Config.Name: [Custom Config] Config Path
Config.Description: Advanced. Path inside the container to a custom OpenTelemetry collector config when custom config mode is enabled.
